english: foot; part of an ancient form

etymology.description: и¶і(и¶і) (zГә, 'foot') + еӨё(еӨё) (kuДҒ, 'to brag') = foot + phonetic component -> final meaning related to foot part
etymology.interpretation: The character рЎ•’ is a variant form of и·Ё(и·Ё), which uses и¶і(и¶і) to denote the semantic field of 'foot' and the phonetic еӨё(еӨё) to suggest pronunciation. This combination indicates actions or positions related to the feet.
